title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5's capabilities for website design tasks, comparing it against Opus 4.8 across three difficulty levels. He showcases the model's ability to extract design patterns and rebuild websites, discussing trade-offs between token usage and design quality.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 on website design tasks, benchmarking it against Opus 4.8 across three difficulty levels. The demonstration covers the model extracting design patterns from existing sites and rebuilding them. Roberts weighs the trade-offs between token usage and resulting design quality, drawing on prompt engineering, computer vision, and token optimization.
